name: consumer-features
title: Disable Consumer Features
description: Prevents Windows from automatically installing games, third-party apps, or app links from the Microsoft Store.
modal: Disabling consumer features may make some default apps inaccessible (e.g., Phone Link). Are you sure?
warning: Some default apps may become inaccessible.
deepDescription: This tweak disables Windows Consumer Features, preventing automatic installation of Microsoft Store apps, games, or links. Useful for reducing bloatware and controlling which apps are installed.
